accounting.name: Accounting
accounting.typical_client: SME owners, corporate organisations, individuals needing tax or audit services
accounting.website_purpose: Establish professional credibility, capture enquiries for tax, audit, and advisory services
accounting.decision_driver: Credibility and professional qualifications — clients want to see that you are licensed and experienced before trusting you with their finances.
accounting.niche_faq_1: What should an accounting firm website include to win corporate clients?
accounting.niche_faq_1_answer: Corporate clients evaluating accounting firms look for: team qualifications (ICAN, ACCA certifications), a clear list of services, client testimonials, and case studies showing measurable results. GetOnline Studio builds accounting firm websites that present all these credibility signals clearly.
accounting.niche_faq_2: Can an accounting firm website help with lead generation or just credibility?
accounting.niche_faq_2_answer: Both. A well-optimised accounting firm website generates leads from people searching for specific services — like 'tax consultant in Lagos' or 'audit firm in Abuja'. GetOnline Studio builds accounting websites with full local SEO to capture these high-intent searches.
accounting.branding_note: Conservative, trustworthy design — navy, dark green, or charcoal colour palettes signal financial authority
accounting.urgency_context: Tax season and year-end audits create seasonal demand spikes where online visibility is critical

agriculture-company.name: Agriculture Company
agriculture-company.typical_client: Farmers, distributors, food processors, export buyers, government agencies
agriculture-company.website_purpose: Showcase products, attract buyers and distributors, access government grants, build export credibility
agriculture-company.decision_driver: Export buyers and corporate purchasers verify credibility through a professional website before placing large orders — it is often the first filter.
agriculture-company.niche_faq_1: Can an agriculture company website help attract international buyers?
agriculture-company.niche_faq_1_answer: Yes. International buyers searching for Nigerian agricultural products — cassava, cocoa, palm oil, sesame seeds — use Google to find suppliers. A professional website with product specifications, certifications, and export capabilities is your most powerful international marketing tool. GetOnline Studio builds export-ready agriculture websites.
agriculture-company.niche_faq_2: What information should an agribusiness website include?
agriculture-company.niche_faq_2_answer: Key elements include: product catalogue with specifications and available volumes, farm or facility photos, certifications (NAFDAC, NOAB etc.), location and logistics information, and a direct enquiry form. GetOnline Studio builds complete agribusiness websites that work for both local and export markets.
agriculture-company.branding_note: Green and earth tones communicate authenticity and natural quality — avoid overly corporate aesthetics
agriculture-company.urgency_context: Harvest seasons and agricultural trade fairs create peaks when buyers actively search for suppliers online

architecture-firm.name: Architecture Firm
architecture-firm.typical_client: Real estate developers, government agencies, corporate organisations, high-net-worth individuals
architecture-firm.website_purpose: Showcase portfolio of completed projects, attract high-value clients, demonstrate design capability
architecture-firm.decision_driver: Portfolio quality is everything. Clients choose architects based on what they have already built — a website that showcases completed projects with high-quality photography is the primary sales tool.
architecture-firm.niche_faq_1: What makes an architecture firm website different from a general business website?
architecture-firm.niche_faq_1_answer: Architecture websites are portfolio-first. Every project should be presented with professional photography, project brief, and the specific design challenges solved. The visual quality of your website directly reflects your design capability to potential clients. GetOnline Studio builds visually stunning architecture portfolios.
architecture-firm.niche_faq_2: Should an architecture firm target residential or commercial clients online?
architecture-firm.niche_faq_2_answer: Both, but separately. Residential clients search for architects differently from commercial developers. GetOnline Studio builds architecture firm websites with separate sections for residential, commercial, and institutional work — ensuring each type of client finds exactly what they are looking for.
architecture-firm.branding_note: Minimal, sophisticated design with emphasis on white space — let the portfolio work speak for itself
architecture-firm.urgency_context: Construction and real estate booms in cities like Lagos and Abuja create strong seasonal demand for architects

bakery.name: Bakery
bakery.typical_client: Individual consumers, event planners, corporate clients ordering bulk or custom items
bakery.website_purpose: Showcase products, take orders, drive WhatsApp enquiries, build brand recognition
bakery.decision_driver: Visual appeal drives bakery decisions. Customers choose based on what they see — a website with mouth-watering photos of actual products converts significantly better than no online presence.
bakery.niche_faq_1: Can a bakery website take orders directly or just show products?
bakery.niche_faq_1_answer: GetOnline Studio can build bakery websites that take orders directly via a simple order form, or redirect to a WhatsApp conversation for custom orders — whichever works better for your operation. Many Nigerian bakeries prefer WhatsApp orders because they can discuss customisation in real-time.
bakery.niche_faq_2: What photos should a bakery include on their website?
bakery.niche_faq_2_answer: High-quality photos of your actual products — not stock images — are essential. Customers decide based on what your real cakes and pastries look like. GetOnline Studio advises on photography requirements during our process and can optimise whatever images you have.
bakery.branding_note: Warm, inviting colours — creams, pinks, warm browns — communicate taste and comfort
bakery.urgency_context: Wedding season, Christmas, and school resumption periods drive peak cake and pastry orders

beauty-spa.name: Beauty Spa

beauty-spa.website_purpose: Showcase services and results, enable appointment booking, drive WhatsApp enquiries, display pricing
beauty-spa.decision_driver: Results-driven decisions — clients want to see before/after photos of actual work before booking. A website with real results builds trust that Instagram alone cannot.

beauty-spa.niche_faq_1_answer: Both work together but serve different purposes. Instagram builds awareness and community. A website builds credibility, appears in Google searches, and provides a professional home for your booking system, pricing, and full service menu. Clients who find you on Instagram will Google you before booking — a professional website converts that search into a booking.

beauty-spa.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio can integrate appointment booking systems into beauty spa websites — from simple WhatsApp booking links to full calendar-based booking systems depending on your preference and budget.
beauty-spa.branding_note: Soft, luxurious aesthetics — rose gold, cream, black, or sage green depending on positioning
beauty-spa.urgency_context: Valentine's Day, Christmas/New Year, wedding seasons, and Detty December create strong demand peaks

catering.name: Catering
catering.typical_client: Event planners, corporate organisations, individuals hosting weddings/birthdays/burials
catering.website_purpose: Showcase menu and presentation, capture event enquiries, display pricing packages, build corporate client relationships
catering.decision_driver: Event planners and corporate clients research caterers extensively before committing to a contract. A professional website with photos, testimonials, and clear packages wins the research phase.
catering.niche_faq_1: What should a catering website show to win corporate clients?
catering.niche_faq_1_answer: Corporate catering clients want to see: photos of food presentation at events similar to their needs, client testimonials from respected organisations, a clear menu or package structure, and capacity for their event size. GetOnline Studio builds catering websites that speak directly to corporate client requirements.

catering.niche_faq_2_answer: Showing approximate pricing ranges or package starting prices helps pre-qualify enquiries and saves time for both you and potential clients. GetOnline Studio advises on the most effective pricing display strategy for your specific catering market.

church.niche_faq_1_answer: Yes. When someone new to a city searches 'churches near me' or 'pentecostal church in Lagos', Google shows websites — not Instagram pages. A professional church website ensures your congregation is visible to everyone searching for a church home in your area.
church.niche_faq_2: Can a church website include sermon recordings and live streaming?
church.niche_faq_2_answer: Absolutely. GetOnline Studio builds church websites with sermon libraries (audio/video), YouTube live stream integration, events calendars, and online giving platforms — giving your congregation and visitors access to your ministry 24/7.
church.branding_note: Welcoming, uplifting design — reflect your church's specific culture and values rather than generic religious templates

cleaning.decision_driver: Trust is the primary barrier — clients are inviting strangers into their homes or offices. A professional website with testimonials, team photos, and clear service terms overcomes this trust barrier significantly.

cleaning.niche_faq_1_answer: Trust signals that work well for cleaning services include: verified client testimonials, team member photos and background check statements, clear terms of service, and photos of real cleaning results. GetOnline Studio builds cleaning service websites specifically engineered to address the trust barrier that prevents enquiries.

cleaning.niche_faq_2_answer: Showing starting prices or package structures (e.g., 'Home cleaning from ₦8,000') helps generate higher-quality enquiries and reduces time wasted on price-sensitive clients. GetOnline Studio advises on the most effective pricing display strategy for your market.
cleaning.branding_note: Clean, bright, and fresh — white, blue, and green signal cleanliness and reliability

construction.niche_faq_1_answer: Government procurement evaluators look for: CAC registration, professional certifications (COREN, CORBON), a portfolio of completed projects with values, client references, and financial standing. crypto.niche_faq_1_answer: Nigerian crypto platforms should clearly display their CBN status, SEC registration (if applicable), security protocols, and terms of service. GetOnline Studio builds crypto websites that present regulatory compliance information in the way that builds maximum user confidence.

crypto.niche_faq_2_answer: Trust signals specifically important for Nigerian crypto users include: team profiles with verifiable LinkedIn profiles, regulatory disclosures, security certifications, transparent fee structures, and genuine user testimonials. driving-school.niche_faq_1_answer: The most important elements are: clear pricing for different course types, schedule options (weekday/weekend), VIO examination pass rate, instructor qualifications, and student testimonials. ecommerce.niche_faq_1: Is it worth building an ecommerce website when Jumia and Konga already exist?
ecommerce.niche_faq_1_answer: Yes. Marketplace platforms charge 5–15% commission on every sale and own your customer data. Your own ecommerce website eliminates these fees, lets you build a direct customer relationship, and gives you full control over pricing and branding. GetOnline Studio builds e-commerce websites that work alongside — or replace — marketplace dependency.
ecommerce.niche_faq_2: Which payment gateway should a Nigerian ecommerce website use?
ecommerce.niche_faq_2_answer: GetOnline Studio integrates Paystack and Flutterwave — Nigeria's two most trusted payment gateways — into every ecommerce website we build. Both support all major Nigerian banks, USSD payments, and card transactions with high success rates.
ecommerce.branding_note: Visual product presentation is everything — invest in quality product photography before launch

makeup-artist.typical_client: Brides, event attendees, corporate photography subjects, media production
makeup-artist.website_purpose: Showcase portfolio, attract bridal and event bookings, display pricing packages
makeup-artist.decision_driver: Brides especially research makeup artists extensively — they want to see before/after photos of actual clients in similar skin tones and styles. A website is significantly more credible than an Instagram page alone.
makeup-artist.niche_faq_1: What makes a makeup artist website convert bridal bookings?
makeup-artist.niche_faq_1_answer: The highest-converting makeup artist websites include: before/after portfolio photos showing diverse skin tones, clear bridal package pricing, genuine client testimonials, and a simple booking process. GetOnline Studio builds makeup artist portfolios that consistently win bridal bookings.
makeup-artist.niche_faq_2: Should a makeup artist website show prices?
makeup-artist.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. Transparent pricing for packages (e.g., 'Bridal glam from ₦35,000') pre-qualifies enquiries and attracts clients aligned with your price point. GetOnline Studio advises on the best pricing display strategy for your positioning.
makeup-artist.branding_note: Glamorous and feminine — gold, black, nude, and rose gold aesthetics communicate luxury and beauty
makeup-artist.urgency_context: Wedding season (October–December, April–June) and Detty December are peak bridal makeup booking periods

microfinance.name: Microfinance
microfinance.typical_client: SME owners, market traders, artisans, individuals needing quick credit access
microfinance.website_purpose: Build regulatory credibility, communicate loan products clearly, generate application enquiries
microfinance.decision_driver: Given Nigeria's history of financial fraud, trust is the primary barrier. CBN licensing and transparent product information on a professional website are the most important conversion factors.
microfinance.niche_faq_1: What regulatory information must a microfinance website display?
microfinance.niche_faq_1_answer: Microfinance websites must display their CBN Microfinance Banking licence number, NDIC membership, interest rate disclosures, and data privacy policy. GetOnline Studio builds microfinance websites that present all required regulatory information clearly.
microfinance.niche_faq_2: Can a microfinance website include a loan calculator?
microfinance.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. A loan repayment calculator is one of the most effective conversion tools on a microfinance website — it lets potential borrowers instantly see their repayment schedule, which builds confidence and increases application rates. GetOnline Studio builds microfinance websites with integrated loan calculators.
microfinance.branding_note: Trustworthy and approachable — warm blues and greens balance financial credibility with community accessibility
microfinance.urgency_context: Market periods, trade fairs, and Ramadan preparation periods drive strong microfinance loan searches

music-school.name: Music School
music-school.typical_client: Children (through parents), teenagers, adult learners, aspiring musicians
music-school.website_purpose: Showcase curriculum and instructors, drive enrolments, display tuition fees, build community
music-school.decision_driver: Parents research music schools carefully before enrolling their children. Instructor credentials, class sizes, and curriculum structure are all researched online. A professional website drives significantly more enrolments than word-of-mouth alone.
music-school.niche_faq_1: What should a music school website include to attract new students?
music-school.niche_faq_1_answer: Effective music school websites include: instructor profiles with musical credentials, course offerings and pricing, student performance videos, clear schedule options, and an easy enrolment process. GetOnline Studio builds music school websites that drive consistent new student enrolments.
music-school.niche_faq_2: Can a music school website include online lesson booking?
music-school.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio can integrate simple scheduling systems into music school websites, allowing parents or students to book lesson slots, pay deposits, and receive confirmation — reducing admin burden significantly.
music-school.branding_note: Creative and inspiring — music schools benefit from rich media: performance videos, student testimonials, and instructor showcases
music-school.urgency_context: School resumption seasons and WAEC/NECO music examination periods drive music lesson enrolment peaks

ngo.name: NGO
ngo.typical_client: Donors, grant-making foundations, partner organisations, volunteers, beneficiaries
ngo.website_purpose: Build donor confidence, attract grant funding, communicate impact, recruit volunteers
ngo.decision_driver: Donors and grant-making foundations conduct extensive due diligence online before committing funds. A professional website demonstrating clear impact, accountability, and programme credibility is essential for fundraising success.
ngo.niche_faq_1: What makes an NGO website effective for attracting international grant funding?
ngo.niche_faq_1_answer: International funders look for: clear impact metrics, transparent financial reporting, professional team profiles, detailed programme descriptions, and evidence of local community trust. GetOnline Studio builds NGO websites specifically designed to meet the credibility standards international funders require.
ngo.niche_faq_2: Should an NGO website include online donation capability?
ngo.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio integrates Paystack and international donation platforms (including Stripe for diaspora donors) into NGO websites, making it easy for both Nigerian and international donors to contribute directly.
ngo.branding_note: Impactful and authentic — real beneficiary photos and genuine impact stories are more compelling than stock imagery
ngo.urgency_context: Grant application seasons and international fundraising campaigns create demand for NGO website credibility

oil-gas.name: Oil & Gas
oil-gas.typical_client: International oil companies (IOCs), NNPC, DPR, industrial buyers, government agencies
oil-gas.website_purpose: Establish operational credibility, attract vendor qualification, demonstrate certifications and capacity
oil-gas.decision_driver: IOC vendor qualification requires a professional online presence. DPR registration, safety certifications, and demonstrated project experience are researched thoroughly before any commercial engagement.
oil-gas.niche_faq_1: What certifications must a Nigerian oil and gas company website display?
oil-gas.niche_faq_1_answer: Nigerian oil and gas service companies should prominently display DPR registration, NIPEX certification, ISO certifications, HSE policy and safety records, and NOGIC JQS prequalification status. GetOnline Studio builds oil and gas company websites that present all required vendor qualification documentation.
oil-gas.niche_faq_2: How important is a website for IOC vendor pre-qualification?
oil-gas.niche_faq_2_answer: Critical. Most IOC vendor qualification processes require submitting a company website URL. A professional, comprehensive website demonstrating capacity, certifications, and project history is a prerequisite for being shortlisted. GetOnline Studio has built vendor qualification websites for Port Harcourt and Warri oil service companies.
oil-gas.branding_note: Industrial and credible — blues, greys, and oranges communicate technical capability and safety consciousness
oil-gas.urgency_context: IOC budget approval periods and NNPC contract cycles drive vendor research activity

pet-store.name: Pet Store
pet-store.typical_client: Pet owners, veterinary clinics, animal breeders
pet-store.website_purpose: Drive local store traffic, enable online orders, showcase available animals and products
pet-store.decision_driver: Nigeria's growing pet ownership culture, particularly in Lagos and Abuja, drives increasing online research for pet products and services. Pet owners search for availability and pricing online before visiting stores.
pet-store.niche_faq_1: What products should a Nigerian pet store feature on their website?
pet-store.niche_faq_1_answer: The most searched pet products in Nigeria are dog food (Royal Canin, Pedigree), pet accessories, grooming services, and available puppies or kittens. GetOnline Studio builds pet store websites with product catalogues that capture these high-intent search terms.
pet-store.niche_faq_2: Can a pet store website take orders for home delivery?
pet-store.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio can build pet store websites with WhatsApp-based order systems or full ecommerce functionality including Paystack payment and delivery tracking for pet supplies in your coverage area.
pet-store.branding_note: Warm, fun, and pet-friendly — bright, approachable colours that signal love and care for animals
pet-store.urgency_context: Christmas pet gifting season and the growing Lagos/Abuja pet community drive consistent search volume

pharmacy.name: Pharmacy
pharmacy.typical_client: Patients, caregivers, healthcare facilities, corporate organisations
pharmacy.website_purpose: Build trust and credibility, display product availability, attract prescription fulfilment relationships
pharmacy.decision_driver: PCN registration and product authenticity are the primary trust factors. Patients need confidence that a pharmacy is licensed and stocks genuine medications before placing orders.
pharmacy.niche_faq_1: What regulatory information must a pharmacy website display?
pharmacy.niche_faq_1_answer: Nigerian pharmacy websites should display PCN (Pharmacy Council of Nigeria) registration number, NAFDAC-approved products statement, and a clear returns/dispensing policy. GetOnline Studio builds pharmacy websites that display all required regulatory information prominently.
pharmacy.niche_faq_2: Can a pharmacy take online orders and deliver medications?
pharmacy.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes, within regulatory guidelines. GetOnline Studio can build pharmacy websites with WhatsApp ordering systems for OTC medications and supplement orders, with delivery coverage areas clearly displayed. Prescription dispensing requires in-person verification per PCN guidelines.
pharmacy.branding_note: Clinical and trustworthy — green crosses, white, and blue signal health, cleanliness, and care
pharmacy.urgency_context: Malaria season, festive travel period health preparations, and NHIA health insurance drives spike pharmacy searches

photography.name: Photography
photography.website_purpose: Showcase portfolio to attract bookings, display packages, build brand identity
photography.decision_driver: Photography clients hire based entirely on portfolio quality. A website with properly displayed, high-resolution portfolio images is significantly more credible than social media alone.
photography.niche_faq_1: Should a photographer's website be organised by photography type?
photography.niche_faq_1_answer: Yes. Separate portfolio sections for weddings, events, portraits, and commercial photography allow each type of client to find exactly what they need. GetOnline Studio builds photographer websites with category-specific portfolios that convert each client type effectively.
photography.niche_faq_2: Do photographers in Nigeria need a website or is Instagram sufficient?
photography.niche_faq_2_answer: Instagram is powerful for discovery but a website is essential for conversion. When couples or event planners are seriously considering hiring you, they will Google your name and visit your website to see the full portfolio, packages, and pricing. GetOnline Studio builds photographer websites that convert that research into bookings.
photography.branding_note: Let the photography speak — minimal design that showcases images without distraction
photography.urgency_context: Wedding season booking periods (January–March for December weddings, July–September for December planning) drive high photography search volume

real-estate.name: Real Estate
real-estate.typical_client: Property buyers, renters, investors, diaspora buyers, corporate real estate clients
real-estate.website_purpose: Showcase property listings, capture buyer/renter leads, build developer credibility, attract diaspora buyers
real-estate.decision_driver: Property buyers research extensively online before contacting any agent or developer. A professional listings website with quality photos and detailed information is the primary lead generation tool for serious real estate businesses.
real-estate.niche_faq_1: How important is a website for reaching diaspora property buyers in Nigeria?
real-estate.niche_faq_1_answer: Critical. Diaspora buyers in the UK, USA, and Europe research Nigerian property investments almost entirely online. A professional website with clear property listings, prices in both Naira and foreign currency, and transparent developer credentials is your most effective tool for capturing diaspora investment. GetOnline Studio builds diaspora-ready real estate websites.
real-estate.niche_faq_2: Should a real estate website include a mortgage or payment plan calculator?
real-estate.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. A payment plan calculator showing how a property can be purchased in instalments dramatically increases enquiry rates — most Nigerian property buyers need flexible payment options. GetOnline Studio integrates interactive payment calculators into every real estate website.
real-estate.branding_note: Professional and aspirational — quality property photography communicates the lifestyle the property represents
real-estate.urgency_context: Year-end bonuses (December), NYSC batch calls driving relocation needs, and diaspora holiday visits drive real estate search peaks

recruitment.name: Recruitment
recruitment.typical_client: Corporate organisations seeking talent, job seekers, SMEs needing HR outsourcing
recruitment.website_purpose: Attract both corporate clients and job candidates, build credibility in the HR market
recruitment.decision_driver: Corporate HR directors evaluate recruitment agencies based on sector specialisation, candidate database depth, and placement track record — all communicated through a professional website.
recruitment.niche_faq_1: Should a recruitment agency website target employers or job seekers?
recruitment.niche_faq_1_answer: Both, but separately. GetOnline Studio builds recruitment websites with two clear pathways — one for employers seeking talent and one for candidates submitting CVs. This dual approach maximises both client acquisition and candidate database building simultaneously.
recruitment.niche_faq_2: Can a recruitment agency website include a live job listings board?
recruitment.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio builds recruitment websites with managed job listings boards that allow your team to post, update, and close vacancies easily — attracting candidates organically through Google searches for specific job types and locations.
recruitment.branding_note: Professional and confident — clean corporate aesthetics that appeal to both HR directors and career-focused candidates
recruitment.urgency_context: New financial year (January) corporate hiring budgets and graduate recruitment seasons drive strong HR search volume

restaurant.name: Restaurant
restaurant.typical_client: Diners, event organisers, corporate lunch clients, food delivery platform users
restaurant.website_purpose: Drive reservations and orders, showcase menu and ambience, build brand identity
restaurant.decision_driver: People search for restaurants before they visit or order. A website with menu, prices, photos, and location converts 'restaurant in Lagos' searches into actual diners before competitors even know they were searching.
restaurant.niche_faq_1: Should a restaurant website include online ordering?
restaurant.niche_faq_1_answer: GetOnline Studio builds restaurant websites with integrated WhatsApp ordering (for simple operations) or full online ordering systems (for higher-volume restaurants). Both approaches eliminate third-party delivery app commissions and build direct customer relationships.
restaurant.niche_faq_2: How does a restaurant website rank on Google Maps?
restaurant.niche_faq_2_answer: A properly optimised restaurant website, combined with an active Google Business Profile, dramatically increases your chances of appearing in Google Maps results for 'restaurants near me' searches. GetOnline Studio includes Google Business Profile setup and optimisation with every restaurant website.
restaurant.branding_note: Mouth-watering food photography is the most important element — professional food photography pays for itself immediately
restaurant.urgency_context: Lunch hour, evening diner searches, and major events (concerts, matches, public holidays) drive restaurant search peaks

school.name: School
school.typical_client: Parents enrolling children, students seeking school information, government inspection bodies
school.website_purpose: Attract new enrolments, communicate school values and curriculum, build parent confidence
school.decision_driver: Parents research schools extensively before enrolling children. Academic results, facilities, extra-curricular activities, and school values are all researched online. A professional school website is now the first impression most parents receive.
school.niche_faq_1: What do parents look for on a school website when choosing where to enrol their children?
school.niche_faq_1_answer: Parents primarily evaluate: academic results and examinations pass rates, facilities photos (especially classrooms, labs, and sports areas), teacher qualifications, school fees, and extra-curricular offerings. GetOnline Studio builds school websites that answer every parent question before they call.
school.niche_faq_2: Should a school website show fees?
school.niche_faq_2_answer: Showing fee ranges or approximate annual costs helps pre-qualify enquiries and saves time for both admissions staff and parents. Many schools prefer 'contact us for current fees' — GetOnline Studio advises on the approach that works best for your school's admissions strategy.
school.branding_note: Welcoming, educational, and aspirational — showcase genuine student and facility photography
school.urgency_context: School resumption periods (September, January, April) and form entry seasons drive strong school website traffic

software.website_purpose: Showcase technical capability, attract project enquiries, demonstrate past work, attract talent
software.decision_driver: Technical clients evaluate software companies through their website's technical quality — a poorly built website immediately signals that the company cannot deliver technical excellence.
software.niche_faq_1: What should a software company website include to attract enterprise clients?
software.niche_faq_1_answer: Enterprise clients evaluating software companies look for: detailed case studies with measurable outcomes, technology stack transparency, ISO or CMMI certifications, team size and technical depth, and client reference contacts. GetOnline Studio builds software company websites that communicate enterprise-grade capability.
software.niche_faq_2: Should a software company's website demonstrate their own technical quality?
software.niche_faq_2_answer: Absolutely — your website is your live portfolio. A fast, well-built, technically impressive website demonstrates your capability before a prospect reads a single word. GetOnline Studio builds software company websites that are technically excellent as well as commercially effective.
software.branding_note: Modern tech aesthetic — dark modes, geometric design, and code-inspired visual language signal technical sophistication
software.urgency_context: Budget approval periods (January, July) and digital transformation project starts drive software company enquiries

solar.name: Solar
solar.typical_client: Homeowners, businesses, industrial facilities, schools, hospitals seeking power independence
solar.website_purpose: Generate installation enquiries, showcase completed systems, display packages and pricing
solar.decision_driver: Solar is a significant investment (₦500,000–₦5M+). Buyers research extensively — system quality, installer credentials, and past installations are all verified online before any site visit.
solar.niche_faq_1: What information should a solar company website include to generate installation leads?
solar.niche_faq_1_answer: The most effective solar company websites include: system packages with approximate sizing guides, photos of completed installations, ROI/savings calculators showing payback period, installer certifications, and genuine client testimonials with power independence results. GetOnline Studio builds solar company websites that generate consistent installation enquiries.
solar.niche_faq_2: Should a solar company website include a solar ROI calculator?
solar.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes — it is one of the highest-converting tools on a solar website. When potential clients can input their current electricity bill and see projected savings and payback period, enquiry rates increase dramatically. GetOnline Studio builds solar websites with interactive ROI calculators.
solar.branding_note: Bright, clean, and forward-looking — yellows, blues, and greens communicate energy, sustainability, and reliability
solar.urgency_context: NEPA/PHCN grid failures and tariff increases drive immediate solar enquiry spikes — ensure your website captures these moments

supermarket.name: Supermarket
supermarket.typical_client: Local consumers, households, corporate bulk buyers, events caterers
supermarket.website_purpose: Drive store traffic, enable online ordering, showcase promotions, build brand loyalty
supermarket.decision_driver: Supermarket customers increasingly search for specific products online before deciding where to shop. A website showing product availability and promotions captures these searches before competitors.
supermarket.niche_faq_1: Can a supermarket website take orders for home delivery?
supermarket.niche_faq_1_answer: Yes. GetOnline Studio builds supermarket websites with WhatsApp-based ordering systems that allow customers to submit orders and receive delivery confirmation — without needing a complex ecommerce platform. This is the most practical approach for Nigerian supermarkets.
supermarket.niche_faq_2: What is the most important feature for a Nigerian supermarket website?
supermarket.niche_faq_2_answer: The WhatsApp order button is the single most important conversion element. Nigerian grocery customers prefer ordering via WhatsApp over complex checkout systems. GetOnline Studio builds supermarket websites with prominent, easy WhatsApp ordering as the primary CTA.
supermarket.branding_note: Bright and commercial — strong product photography and bold promotional banners drive purchasing decisions
supermarket.urgency_context: Festive seasons (Christmas, Eid), school resumption, and public holidays drive supermarket traffic and order spikes

tech-startup.name: Tech Startup
tech-startup.typical_client: Investors, potential co-founders, early adopters, media, accelerator programs
tech-startup.website_purpose: Attract users to the product, build investor credibility, communicate the problem being solved
tech-startup.decision_driver: Investors, accelerators, and potential hires all evaluate a startup primarily through their website. The website must clearly communicate: the problem, the solution, the traction, and the team.
tech-startup.niche_faq_1: What should a Nigerian tech startup website include to attract investor interest?
tech-startup.niche_faq_1_answer: Investor-facing startup websites need: a crisp problem statement, clear solution description, traction metrics (users, revenue, growth), team backgrounds with relevant credentials, and a clear investor contact path. GetOnline Studio builds startup websites designed for both user acquisition and investor due diligence.
tech-startup.niche_faq_2: When should a tech startup invest in a professional website vs building it themselves?
tech-startup.niche_faq_2_answer: The moment you start pitching investors, approaching enterprise clients, or applying to accelerators — your website becomes a credibility signal that affects real outcomes. GetOnline Studio builds professional startup websites that give early-stage Nigerian tech companies the credibility infrastructure they need to compete.
tech-startup.branding_note: Product-led and modern — the website should demonstrate the same quality and thinking that the product embodies
tech-startup.urgency_context: Accelerator application seasons and Nigeria's tech conference circuit create peaks in startup website searches

travel-agency.name: Travel Agency
travel-agency.typical_client: Holiday travellers, business travellers, diaspora visitors, pilgrims (Hajj/Umrah/Jerusalem)
travel-agency.website_purpose: Attract enquiries for packages and flights, enable online quote requests, build trust for high-value bookings
travel-agency.decision_driver: Travel is a high-trust, high-value purchase. Customers research agencies thoroughly — IATA accreditation, client testimonials, and package transparency are all verified online before any booking is made.
travel-agency.niche_faq_1: What accreditations should a Nigerian travel agency display on their website?
travel-agency.niche_faq_1_answer: IATA accreditation, NTA (Nigerian Tourism Development Corporation) registration, and NACCIMA/AFTAN membership are the key trust signals. GetOnline Studio builds travel agency websites that prominently display these credentials to build instant booking confidence.
travel-agency.niche_faq_2: How does a travel agency website compete with online booking platforms?
travel-agency.niche_faq_2_answer: By offering what platforms cannot — expertise, personalisation, and trusted relationships. A travel agency website should position the human expertise and local knowledge of your agents as the clear advantage over impersonal online booking. GetOnline Studio builds travel agency websites around the value of expert human service.
travel-agency.branding_note: Aspirational and destination-inspiring — destination photography should make visitors want to travel
travel-agency.urgency_context: Summer holiday season, Christmas travel, Hajj season, and school holiday periods drive strong travel agency search peaks

waste-management.name: Waste Management
waste-management.typical_client: Corporate organisations, housing estates, government agencies, industrial facilities
waste-management.website_purpose: Attract B2B contracts, display service capabilities and coverage, build environmental credibility
waste-management.decision_driver: Corporate and government waste management contracts require vendor verification. Equipment capacity, coverage areas, and environmental certifications are all researched online before procurement processes begin.
waste-management.niche_faq_1: What certifications should a waste management company display on their website?
waste-management.niche_faq_1_answer: Key credentials for Nigerian waste management companies include NESREA compliance, NAFDAC waste handling approvals (where applicable), state EPA registration, and ISO 14001 environmental management certification. GetOnline Studio builds waste management websites that present all relevant certifications clearly.
waste-management.niche_faq_2: Can a waste management website help win housing estate contracts?
waste-management.niche_faq_2_answer: Yes. Estate management companies and housing development managers increasingly search for waste management partners online. A professional website targeting 'waste management for estates in [city]' can generate consistent B2B leads. GetOnline Studio builds waste management websites with targeted B2B messaging.
waste-management.branding_note: Clean and environmental — greens and blues communicate sustainability, reliability, and environmental responsibility
waste-management.urgency_context: Corporate budget renewal periods and government regulatory enforcement drives create peaks in waste management contract searches

wedding-planner.name: Wedding Planner
wedding-planner.typical_client: Engaged couples, parents planning weddings, corporate clients (for white wedding receptions)
wedding-planner.website_purpose: Showcase portfolio, attract premium bookings, display packages, build trust for high-value engagements
wedding-planner.decision_driver: Wedding planning is one of the highest-trust, highest-value purchases most couples make. They research planners extensively — portfolio quality, testimonials, and professionalism are all verified online before a single meeting.
wedding-planner.niche_faq_1: What type of wedding portfolio converts the most enquiries from a website?
wedding-planner.niche_faq_1_answer: Real wedding photos with diverse styles — traditional, white wedding, outdoor, indoor — that show the actual scale and quality of events you deliver. Behind-the-scenes setup photos and vendor coordination evidence also build confidence. GetOnline Studio builds wedding planner portfolios that convert serious couples.
wedding-planner.niche_faq_2: Should a wedding planner show pricing on their website?
wedding-planner.niche_faq_2_answer: Showing package tiers (e.g., 'Full-Service Wedding Planning from ₦250,000') pre-qualifies enquiries and attracts couples in your price range. GetOnline Studio advises on pricing transparency strategy that maximises enquiry quality without deterring the right clients.
wedding-planner.branding_note: Elegant and romantic — soft whites, golds, and blush pinks communicate the magic of weddings
wedding-planner.urgency_context: Engagement season (Christmas/New Year proposals) and peak wedding season planning (January bookings for December weddings) drive strong planner search traffic
